'''Kuat Leisure''' was a subsidiary of [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Kuat Leisure produced a number of pleasure [[Starship/Legends|starships]] toward the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. One such model was the [[121-B]] interstellar yacht.

==Appearances==
